/CAL  PROBATION CONDITION STATUS/X  DEFENDANT WITHDRAWS GUILTY PLEA AND ETERS NOT GUILTY PLEA/MO PC 1385:SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF ALL BHC REQUIREMENTS/

/CAL: BEHAVIOR COURT GRADUATION/MISD4:4/CTORD: FINES AND FEES PERMANENTLYSTAYED/CTORD: PROBATION REVERTS FROM ADP TO COURT PROBATION/X: COURT PROBATION IS TO EXPIRE 03-16-16/ /X: PER NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION IF THE DEFENDANT IS ARREST FREE FOR  ONE YEAR AND IN TREATMENT HE CAN WITHDRAW PLEA AND PETITION TO HAVE THE CASE DISMISSED/X: DEFENDANT SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETES BHC//CONTD: PROBATION CONDITION STATUS/DOP/

/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 127D /CTS:127 /DNACOMP/DEF:TO ENROLL, PARTICIPATEAND COMPLETE THE REQUIRED SERVICES AND OR TREATMENT, COUNSELING AS IDENTIFIED IN HE PROBATIONER'S INDIVIDUALIZED TREATMENT& REHBILITATION PLAN/X:RESTITUTION TO VICTIM/X:COURT RESERVES RIGHT TO RESTITUTION/WS/VF4:280/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/PROB TERM:03-16-16/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/CONTD: BEHAVIOR COURT      /
